data.name: Entwined Roots
data.detailed_description:
The forest is under threat from an advancing horde of undead, so the Adventurer's Guild has been especially busy in recent days, with numerous jobs available.

As a beginner summoner, you've accepted a very peculiar job: Protect an old sacred tree.
You thought it was an odd job at first, but then you learnt it's not just any normal tree...

This special tree, separated from the forest nearby, is home to Olivea... A captivating Dryad.

Olivea is a mature dryad, she requested for your help, and she's ready to reward you for all of your efforts...

 

Entwined Roots is a blend of Visual Novel storytelling and simple yet engaging tower defense battles.

With each level you conquer, unlock new story segments and steamy hand-drawn scenes that bring you closer to Olivea.

You can replay your favourite scenes at any time through the gallery.

data.short_description: Protect the sacred tree and bond with a beautiful mature dryad, in this tower defense and visual novel blend. Conquer levels to unlock story segments and steamy hand-drawn scenes.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 2.0 GHz or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with DirectX 11 support
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 2.5 GHz or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with DirectX 11 support
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: SSD recommended for faster loading times; 16:9 display resolution for optimal visuals.
